sections.heading: VMock Resume tool
sections.body: VMock Smart Resume is an AI-powered tool that gives you instant, personalised feedback on your resume and lets you tailor it to a specific job opportunity you're interested in. Access it anytime, anywhere to receive tailored improvement suggestions or choose from professional templates that help your resume stand out.

sections.heading: Crafting a Resume
sections.body:
Your resume is a key part of your job application. It shows your qualifications, experience, skills and accomplishments, and if done well, will help you get a job interview.

In this module, you'll learn how to create a resume that:

- looks professional
- highlights your strengths
- matches the requirements of a specific job.
